seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 200 words, with no paragraph exceeding 50 words.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain at least 200 words, with no paragraph exceeding 50 words.
response:
Subject: Vacation Approval - [Employee Name]

I am delighted to confirm the approval of your requested vacation time. Your dates, from [Start Date] through [End Date], have been officially logged in the system. Please ensure all your critical projects are fully documented and handed over to [Colleague's Name] before your departure. We trust you will use this time to fully recharge.

We have adjusted the team calendar accordingly to ensure smooth workflow continuity in your absence. Before you sign off, please coordinate with me to finalize coverage plans for any urgent matters that might arise. Preparation is key to a seamless leave period for everyone involved.

Enjoy your well-deserved break! We look forward to welcoming you back refreshed and ready to tackle new challenges upon your return on [Return Date]. Should you have any final administrative questions before then, please do not hesitate to reach out to me directly.<turn|>
